def hex_to_rgb\(h\):
    h = h.lstrip\('#'\)
    return tuple\(int\(h[i:i+2], 16\) for i in \(0, 2, 4\)\)

def relative_luminance\(rgb\):
    vals = []
    for c in rgb:
        s = c / 255.0
        if s <= 0.04045:
            vals.append\(s / 12.92\)
        else:
            vals.append\(\(\(s + 0.055\) / 1.055\) ** 2.4\)
    return 0.2126 * vals[0] + 0.7152 * vals[1] + 0.0722 * vals[2]

def contrast_ratio\(c1, c2\):
    l1 = relative_luminance\(hex_to_rgb\(c1\)\)
    l2 = relative_luminance\(hex_to_rgb\(c2\)\)
    if l1 < l2:
        l1, l2 = l2, l1
    return \(l1 + 0.05\) / \(l2 + 0.05\)

# Effective backgrounds \(approximated - rgba on solid bg\)
def blend\(fg_rgb, bg_rgb, alpha\):
    return tuple\(int\(fg_rgb[i] * alpha + bg_rgb[i] * \(1 - alpha\)\) for i in range\(3\)\)

def rgb_to_hex\(rgb\):
    return '#{:02x}{:02x}{:02x}'.format\(*rgb\)

# ======= DARK MODE =======
bg_dark = '#13151f'
print\("=" * 60\)
print\("DARK MODE \(bg: #13151f\)"\)
print\("=" * 60\)

pairs_dark = [
    \("Body text \(--text-main\)", "#ffffff", bg_dark\),
    \("Muted text \(--text-muted\)", "#c5c5c5", bg_dark\),
    \("Secondary text \(--text-secondary\)", "#a0a0a0", bg_dark\),
    \("Accent read \(--c-read\)", "#b8eadd", bg_dark\),
    \("Accent watch \(--c-watch\)", "#bbd3ff", bg_dark\),
    \("Accent alert \(--c-alert\)", "#ffb3c6", bg_dark\),
]

for name, fg, bg in pairs_dark:
    r = contrast_ratio\(fg, bg\)
    status = "PASS" if r >= 7.0 else "FAIL"
    print\(f"  {name}: {fg} on {bg} = {r:.1f}:1 [{status}]"\)

# Callout box backgrounds \(approximate: rgba on #13151f\)
# rgba\(184, 234, 221, 0.05\) on #13151f
callout_bg_dark_rgb = blend\(\(184, 234, 221\), hex_to_rgb\('#13151f'\), 0.05\)
callout_bg_dark = rgb_to_hex\(callout_bg_dark_rgb\)
print\(f"\\n  Callout box effective bg: {callout_bg_dark}"\)

pairs_callout_dark = [
    \("Body text in callout", "#ffffff", callout_bg_dark\),
    \("Muted text in callout", "#c5c5c5", callout_bg_dark\),
    \("c-read title in callout", "#b8eadd", callout_bg_dark\),
]
for name, fg, bg in pairs_callout_dark:
    r = contrast_ratio\(fg, bg\)
    status = "PASS" if r >= 7.0 else "FAIL"
    print\(f"  {name}: {fg} on {bg} = {r:.1f}:1 [{status}]"\)

# Accent callout \(blue\): rgba\(187, 211, 255, 0.05\) on #13151f
accent_bg_dark_rgb = blend\(\(187, 211, 255\), hex_to_rgb\('#13151f'\), 0.05\)
accent_bg_dark = rgb_to_hex\(accent_bg_dark_rgb\)
print\(f"\\n  Accent callout effective bg: {accent_bg_dark}"\)

pairs_accent_dark = [
    \("Body text in accent callout", "#ffffff", accent_bg_dark\),
    \("c-watch title in accent callout", "#bbd3ff", accent_bg_dark\),
]
for name, fg, bg in pairs_accent_dark:
    r = contrast_ratio\(fg, bg\)
    status = "PASS" if r >= 7.0 else "FAIL"
    print\(f"  {name}: {fg} on {bg} = {r:.1f}:1 [{status}]"\)

# Header bar: rgba\(26, 27, 38, 0.95\) on #13151f

# action-btn uses --text-muted

def hex_to_rgb\(h\):
    h = h.lstrip\('#'\)
    return tuple\(int\(h[i:i+2], 16\) for i in \(0, 2, 4\)\)

def relative_luminance\(rgb\):
    vals = []
    for c in rgb:
        s = c / 255.0
        vals.append\(s / 12.92 if s <= 0.04045 else \(\(s + 0.055\) / 1.055\) ** 2.4\)
    return 0.2126 * vals[0] + 0.7152 * vals[1] + 0.0722 * vals[2]

def contrast_ratio\(c1, c2\):
    l1 = relative_luminance\(hex_to_rgb\(c1\)\)
    l2 = relative_luminance\(hex_to_rgb\(c2\)\)
    if l1 < l2: l1, l2 = l2, l1
    return \(l1 + 0.05\) / \(l2 + 0.05\)

print\("GLOSSARY-SPECIFIC CONTRAST CHECK"\)
print\(\)
# Dark: dt color \(--c-read #b8eadd\) on bg \(#13151f\)
# Dark: dd text \(--text-main #fff\) on bg
# Dark: dd border \(--border #2a2d3d\) — decorative, not text
print\("DARK MODE:"\)
print\(f"  dt term \(c-read\):  #b8eadd on #13151f = {contrast_ratio\('#b8eadd', '#13151f'\):.1f}:1"\)
print\(f"  dd body text:      #ffffff on #13151f = {contrast_ratio\('#ffffff', '#13151f'\):.1f}:1"\)

print\(\)
print\("LIGHT MODE:"\)
print\(f"  dt term \(c-read\):  #2a5240 on #f2f4f8 = {contrast_ratio\('#2a5240', '#f2f4f8'\):.1f}:1"\)
print\(f"  dd body text:      #1a1b26 on #f2f4f8 = {contrast_ratio\('#1a1b26', '#f2f4f8'\):.1f}:1"\)
print\(f"  prev/next label:   #404040 on #f2f4f8 = {contrast_ratio\('#404040', '#f2f4f8'\):.1f}:1"\)
PYEOF)
